input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.7.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.7.5
            TITLE: calculation method

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.7.5: Calculation Method
F.8.7.5 Calculation Method 
a. Calculate a failure load for the mounting of the Non Crushable Object(s) from fastener 
shear, tearout, and/or link buckling 
b. Add the peak attenuator load from F.8.7.2

final_answer: rule F.8.7.5: Calculation Method F.8.7.5 Calculation Method a. Calculate a failure load for the mounting of the Non Crushable Object(s) from fastener shear, tearout, and/or link buckling b. Add the peak attenuator load from F.8.7.2
